high_level_description: A candid lifestyle photograph of a cheerful young woman having fun at the beach on a sunny summer day.

style_description.aesthetics: candid lifestyle photography, authentic, warm, natural
style_description.photo: 35mm candid, shallow depth of field, eye-level

compositional_deconstruction.background: A bright sandy beach with turquoise sea and clear blue sky, soft golden sunlight, gentle waves.

elements.desc: A joyful young woman in her mid 20s with sun-kissed skin and windblown brown hair, laughing happily as she plays at the water's edge, carefree relaxed summer-holiday mood.
